# Etra: Names & Cultures — Fantasy ruler titles (all gov types)
# Generated by generate_titles.py
#
# Single country_flavor block for all government types.
# Order: monarchy specific → monarchy fallback → order → theocracy → republic
# Each section: specific dialects first, language fallbacks last.

country_flavor = {
	type = country

	# === MONARCHY — SPECIFIC ===

	# Sittadellian
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_sittadellian
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture = culture:sittadellian_culture }
		}
	}

			ruler ?= { culture = culture:stedeling_culture }
		}
	}

	# === MONARCHY — FALLBACK ===

	# Ardrainien
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_ardrainien
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}

	# Torrent (also: south_torrentor_dialect)
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_torrent
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:south_torrentor_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Torrent (also: central_torrentor_dialect)
	text = {

		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:marcheur_dialect }
		}
	}

	# Sittadellian
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_sittadellian_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture = culture:sittadellian_culture }
		}
	}

			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture = culture:stone_sordrenic_culture }
		}
	}

	# Salt Sordrenic
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_salt_sordrenic_order
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}

			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:rattolini_dialect }
		}
	}

	# Sittadellian

		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_sittadellian_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture = culture:sittadellian_culture }
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_draquatin_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture = culture:draquatin_culture }
		}
	}
	# Draquatin
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_draquatin_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }

	}

	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_tyelkian_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture = culture:tyelkian_culture }
		}
	}

	# === THEOCRACY — FALLBACK ===

	# Ardrainien
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_ardrainien_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:ardrainic_language }
		}
	}
	# Ardrainien
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_ardrainien_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }

		}
	}

		}
	}
	# Torrent
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_torrent_theocracy
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:theocracy
			NOT = { has_reform = government_reform:military_order_reform }
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:torrent_language }
		}
	}
	# Torrent (also: south_torrentor_dialect)

			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:fioranelle_dialect }
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_serenish_republic

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:late_moran_dialect }
		}
	}

			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:republic
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:jasskadian_language }
		}
	}

	# Vulgar Moran (also: fluviolander_dialect)
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_vulgar_moran_tribe
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:tribe
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:fluviolander_dialect }
		}
	}
